name: Ersu Meyve ve Gida Sanayii A.S.
summary: Ersu Meyve ve Gida Sanayii A.S. manufactures and sells fruit concentrates and pulp juices in Turkey and internationally. The company offers clear products, including pear, quince, blackberry, apple, raspberry, sourcherry, pomegranate, black carrot, grape, carrot, and √É¬ßilek juice concentrates; cloudy products, such as peach, apricot, and plum juice concentrates; and citrus fruit products consisting of orange, grapefruit, and lemon juice concentrates. It also provides puree products comprising pear, strawberry, apple, plum, fig, apricot, and peach puree; and tomato paste. In addition, the company offers pomegranate, apple, orange, black carrot, and grape juices; and fruit nectars, such as freemix, mixed fruit, apricot, orange, peach, and sour cherry nectars, as well as lemonade. The company distributes its products through a network of 9 regional directorates, as well as approximately 100 distributors. It serves retail sales points, as well as military facilities, hospital cafes, schools and sport complexes, catering, etc. Ersu Meyve ve Gida Sanayii A.S. was founded in 1969 and is based in Konya, Turkey.
